headline: Boosalis Properties Named Among CoStar's Top Retail Brokers in Washington, D.C. Market
summary: Boosalis Properties, a Prince William County-based commercial real estate firm, has been recognized by CoStar Group as one of the top retail brokerage firms in the Washington, D.C. region, with Principal Broker George Boosalis earning the prestigious 2025 CoStar Power Broker Award.
